statement

conviction
disclosure letter
provided to Mr
Hosi. What has
been located is
an opinion by
Cartwright King,
advising POL
that Mr Hosi
should receive
post conviction

SSIR, HRR and
materials relating
to the Falkirk /
Callendar
Square bug.
